{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400511782FB3246785BA1313012"}"},"total":41841},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7429503164570174233","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错，看文笔就知道作者是个腹有诗书、文墨颇足的人，某些典故信手拈来，一些人物关系有理有据，在平淡中显现出风险，让剧情跌宕起伏，非常不错！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729821963,"group_id":"7414011485757639704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N128341v7Rc6OA0VlIoxuWQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"82085010727","user_name":"荣宁堂的粉曼巴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"82085010727","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1655360815,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414011485757639704","book_info":{"abstract":"（别名《关于南朝贵公子是我冒充的这回事》）
穿越不是请客吃饭，穿越是步步杀机。
江南妩媚，壮志常销。
自古南朝势弱，英雄气促。
没有金手指，没有系统，更没有什么二世为人，一切从零开始！
原主记忆：无！
身份：无！
物资：无！
当真实的穿越来临，我们能活多久？
南方门阀世族，权力网络，纵横交错；北方孝文大帝，铁骑连营，窥江不去。
朝局晦暗难明，内外张机设阱，任你貌比潘安，才拼宋玉，都难免入彀，难逃入局。
然高石入海，能激千尺浪；明月飞舟，可乘万里风。
谁承想，草芥之身，却赢了个花团锦簇？
人难量，涓流一滴，能闹了个浩浩荡荡！
曾天命疏狂，夜宿龙床；也曾肝胆奇谋，枭首名王。
轻鞭犯夜，封还天子制诏；素手长携，不负佳人香雪。
既有狂风为祟，浮云作孽，
那就弹压江山，品题风月，也补天裂！

332760","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"装逼王，王扬，太会装了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745444509,"group_id":"7414011485757639704","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2104943969311865"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414011485757639704","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"353"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":46856,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":75},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7428097546415850264","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"历史类终于又有一篇让我脑子发热，欲罢不能的小说。主角搞得全是高难度操作，一下子看完了，快更新！！！！！！
作者做的各种史料考据，搞得很多，也不显俗套，在刀尖上跳舞……爽。
评论区个个都是人才，超喜欢这里的。[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729495019,"group_id":"7414011485757639704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4o+mCCEvYlqHec1sAYTMeRgjocjqTp9Qo6dl44vhhgB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2104943969311865","user_name":"墨紫苍穹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2104943969311865","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414011485757639704","book_info":{"abstract":"（别名《关于南朝贵公子是我冒充的这回事》）

comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这文是细糠，越嚼越香。少见的南朝文，主角设定穿越前是文学博士生（文史不分家，我怀疑作者是大佬挂马甲[奸笑]）以学者之大才攻网文之小道。逻辑严谨，笔触细腻，大小爆点爽点穿插，附带历史文献和国学科普。能感受南朝时代的社会风俗，真正“活”在南朝。开头以为是多穿文结果不是，随着剧情的展开慢慢代入主角，愈发有感。作者的文笔没得说，引经据典随手就来，常笑梗连出 笔下幽默，时出“金句”。清谈论辩的对话也写得很有意思。群像描写功底扎实，主次配角都有自己思想而非npc式人物。有权谋比拼人情世故，是符合我心中真正的历史文小说之一（不禁想起了七月和三痴等）有瑕却瑕不掩瑜，希望后续情节能更上一层楼。若是能保持高质量必定会爆","text_exts":[{"e":240,"s":236,"text":"人情世故","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774284678A1313012%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227448883731965887256%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227414011485757639704%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734337798,"group_id":"7414011485757639704","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"今夕是何年","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2YxPnoo1Y0v9GVGgPj5jy4YgICh3hzT39CTHu7CQV8P","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f8950dda040b4c139bcd2f6deceffcd9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879408&x-signature=Q%2FRAYMn86SjIf2DcnlAT3E%2BY5wo%3D","user_id":"3456491328382445","user_name":"茶蛰道人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3456491328382445","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414011485757639704","book_info":{"abstract":"（别名《关于南朝贵公子是我冒充的这回事》）
